cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where each gift ends up after all these swaps. So, we have five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. Let me list their starting gifts again to make sure I have them right. - Alice: brown present - Bob: orange ball - Claire: purple present - Dave: yellow present - Eve: white present Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each swap step by step and track who has which gift after each exchange. First swap: Bob and Eve swap their gifts. So Bob, who had the orange ball, now gets Eve's white present. Eve, in turn, takes Bob's orange ball. Let me note that down: After first swap: - Alice: brown - Bob: white (from Eve) - Claire: purple - Dave: yellow - Eve: orange Second swap: Bob and Claire swap. So Bob, who has the white present now, swaps with Claire who has the purple. Now Bob has purple, and Claire has white. After second swap: - Alice: brown - Bob: purple - Claire: white - Dave: yellow - Eve: orange Third swap: Dave and Alice swap. Dave has yellow, Alice has brown. After swapping, Dave gets brown and Alice gets yellow. After third swap: - Alice: yellow - Bob: purple - Claire: white - Dave: brown - Eve: orange Fourth swap: Bob and Eve swap again. Bob has purple, Eve has orange. After swapping, Bob gets orange and Eve gets purple. After fourth swap: - Alice: yellow - Bob: orange - Claire: white - Dave: brown - Eve: purple Fifth swap: Alice and Bob swap. Alice has yellow, Bob has orange. After swapping, Alice gets orange and Bob gets yellow. After fifth swap: - Alice: orange - Bob: yellow - Claire: white - Dave: brown - Eve: purple Wait, so the question is, at the end, what does Bob have? According to my final list, Bob has the yellow present. Looking at the options, (D) is yellow. Let me check my steps again to make sure I didn't mix up any swaps. Let me verify each step: 1. First swap between Bob (orange) and Eve (white): Bob now has white, Eve has orange. Correct. 2. Second swap between Bob (white) and Claire (purple): Bob has purple, Claire has white. Correct. 3. Third swap between Dave (yellow) and Alice (brown): Dave has brown, Alice has yellow. Correct. 4. Fourth swap between Bob (purple) and Eve (orange): Bob gets orange, Eve gets purple. Correct. 5.
